summary: PTEN acts as a tumor suppressor by antagonizing the PI3K-AKT-mTOR pathway, which drives cell proliferation; functional losses increase cancer susceptibility and aggressiveness, particularly seen in Cowden syndrome and sporadic tumors. This genetic regulation underpins its recognized role in controlling cellular growth and genomic integrity.
